summary: All 12 steps + 1 prerequisite completed in a single iteration. Implemented: (1) OpaqueState type-erased container with Debug, new/downcast/downcast_ref/estimated_size_bytes in reify-types/src/warm.rs; (2) WarmStartable trait definition; (3) warm_state: Option<OpaqueState> field on NodeCache with manual Clone (clones as None); (4) CacheStore donate_warm_state/get_warm_state helpers with take semantics, record_evaluation clears warm_state; (5) WarmStatePool in reify-runtime with HashMap<NodeId, PoolEntry>, memory-budgeted LRU eviction (linear scan), donate/retrieve/clear/len/is_empty. All 86+ tests pass across reify-types, reify-eval, and reify-runtime.

All 18 steps + 1 prerequisite completed. Implemented: (1) EvalEvent/EventKind/EventPayload types with Clone+Debug; (2) EventJournal append-only struct with dual BTreeMap<Instant>/HashMap<NodeId> indices; (3) Query methods: events_for_node, events_in_range, events_since, latest_for_node; (4) Engine.journal field with accessor; (5) Instrumented eval() with Started/Completed for all 3 passes (Param/Auto, Let, Resolution); (6) Instrumented edit_param() with Started/Completed for re-evaluated Value nodes; (7) Instrumented eval_cached() with CacheHit for fast-path/cache-reuse and Started/Completed for cache misses. 25 unit tests + 3 integration tests all pass. All existing tests unaffected.
